## Pre-merge Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (zero TypeScript errors)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke` passes locally
- [ ] All new tests are tagged with at least one `@smoke | @navigation | @forms | @functional | @visual | @responsive`
- [ ] Page objects created or updated for any new selectors
- [ ] Visual baselines refreshed if layout changed (`npm run baseline`)
- [ ] No forms submitted, no accounts created, no hardcoded URLs
